text: $theFaction might be just a legend to you, or perhaps you haven't yet begun to engage in further communication with these foreign visitors.
It seems you have met with the Crimson Lord and received a slight acknowledgment from them... but should your relationship only remain at this level?
It appears you're quite familiar with $theFaction now. This feeling of being part of a legend gives you a sense of pride - at least among a bunch of drunkards, you have more to boast about.
You've met most of the important figures in $theFaction, and the rest already know about you. Communication with these foreign visitors doesn't seem as dangerous as you imagined.

The Crimson Lord seems to quite favor you, a human whose lifespan is too short in her eyes. Perhaps one day, when you tire of the conflicts in the Persean Sector, staying in this isolated castle to enjoy your remaining days wouldn't be a bad choice?
Your fear of $theFaction seems to have triggered a series of negative reactions, though fortunately they don't seem to have much intention to pursue the matter.

script:
AddText "Besides a few maids and some people in suits, you can hardly find any living beings in this place. You even begin to wonder how they manage such a large space. The overly luxurious decorations around make you feel alien, as you're more accustomed to rationalized constructions, followed by another strange sense of emptiness." marketFlavorTextColor
AddText "A frighteningly large metal door with ornate edges stands at the end of the road. A long-eared maid tells you that's the Crimson Vault, where the Crimson Lord's not-so-cherished treasures are casually stored." marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "Even for a capital ship, its internal corridors seem excessively spacious. You haven't seen any crew members along the way, as if it has long lost all combat capability and is just floating silently in the void, being used as a small residential station." marketFlavorTextColor
AddText "Well, find who you need to find and leave, unless you also want to settle down here..." marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "Even for a capital ship, its internal corridors seem excessively spacious. You haven't seen any crew members along the way, as if it has long lost all combat capability and is just floating silently in the void, being used as a small residential station." marketFlavorTextColor
AddText "Get your supplies and leave quickly, this damned place doesn't even have anyone to talk to..." marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "A scene like a painting unfolds before your eyes, the surrounding space seems as if it could shatter at any moment, while the solid feeling beneath your feet occasionally pulls you back to reality." marketFlavorTextColor
AddText "Surely no one would want to linger here... after all, just avoiding falling into madness from the reality tears already requires extreme willpower." marketFlavorTextColor

ShowPersonVisual
SetTextHighlightColors LIGHT_CRIMSON
SetTextHighlights "\"Hello... wanderer from another starlit sky...\""
text:
When you attempt to establish communication, the image of a white-haired noblewoman appears before your eyes... She looks so strange that you momentarily can't convince yourself that she's human like you...

But upon closer observation, you realize this is just a recording... the woman in the image is merely repeating a single phrase...

"Hello... wanderer from another starlit sky..."
options: cutCommLink:What a peculiar character...(Leave)

script:
ShowPersonVisual
SetTextHighlightColors IE_WHITE
SetTextHighlights "\"Are you expecting me to say something...?\""
text:
When you send out a communication request, there seems to be no immediate response... However, shortly after, a pre-recorded video appears on your personal terminal.

In the footage appears a white-haired lady wearing an enormous hat... The pointed hat, reminiscent of a "witch", has a mysterious emblem embedded on its front, and a tiny crown hangs at the tip of its point.

She appears quite reliable and mature, her delicate features occasionally revealing hints of intelligence... You even suddenly get the feeling that she might be the most trustworthy being in this castle.

Unfortunately, after leaving just a brief greeting that barely counts as such, the recording reaches its end...

"Are you expecting me to say something...?"
options: cutCommLink:She certainly does seem like a witch...(Leave)

script:
ShowPersonVisual
SetTextHighlightColors DEEP_BLUE
SetTextHighlights "\"Sorry... perhaps our formal meeting will have to wait a bit longer...\""
text:
When you send out a communication request, there seems to be no immediate response... However, shortly after, a pre-recorded video appears on your personal terminal.

In the footage appears a black-haired young woman wearing a blue and white wide-brimmed hat... For a long while after, you just stand there foolishly... as if mind-controlled, studying the figure who exists only as image data...

Of course, this isn't due to any strange brain wave interference... but rather stems from a breathtaking beauty. This beauty, seemingly truly carrying a hint of magic, makes you feel as if time has frozen around you, just like when piloting a phase ship entering phase space...

What's regrettable is that after leaving just a single greeting, the recording reaches its end...

"Sorry... perhaps our formal meeting will have to wait a bit longer..."
options: cutCommLink:So... what kind of charm magic is this...?(Leave)

script:
ShowPersonVisual
SetTextHighlightColors DUST_RED
SetTextHighlights "\"This is as far as you go... mortal...\""
text:
When you send out a communication request, there seems to be no immediate response... However, shortly after, a pre-recorded video appears on your personal terminal.

In the footage appears a black-haired woman emanating an untouchable aura... Both her clothing and exposed skin appear almost burning red-hot, while her black hair floats wildly in the air behind her.

Honestly... although she shares all the same characteristics as yourself, you're certain that at least this time, the person before you is no ordinary being...

Just as you begin to let your mind wander, the recording reaches its end... accompanied by an echoing warning.

"This is as far as you go... mortal..."
options: cutCommLink:A chill runs down your spine...(Leave)

script:
ShowPersonVisual
SetTextHighlightColors EIF_ORANGE
SetTextHighlights "\"Please don't feed... them...(Playback terminated)\""
text:
When you send out a communication request, there seems to be no immediate response... However, shortly after, a pre-recorded video appears on your personal terminal.

In the footage appears a brown-haired girl wearing a white hood... In her petite figure and youthful face, you can only see traces of a few short years, yet the conservative clothing completely enveloping her body seems at odds with her innocent cuteness, as if trying to restrict it.

Around her are many fluffy pets wandering freely, one even attempting to tug at the white glove on her hand. Undeniably... this harmonious scene looks incredibly heartwarming.

However, the recording abruptly ends, before she could even finish a complete sentence...

"Please don't feed... them...(Playback terminated)"
options: cutCommLink:They're... not hungry?(Leave)

script:
ShowPersonVisual
SetTextHighlightColors SOUL_GREEN
SetTextHighlights "\"Would you like to experience a death that isn't just darkness?\""
text:
When you send out a communication request, there seems to be no immediate response... However, shortly after, a pre-recorded video appears on your personal terminal.

In the footage appears a... woman? with a floating crown above her head. She appears like an eternally burning brilliant soul, with blue flames forming a sorrowful body that seems capable of bringing everything around it to a standstill...

The sight appears so solemn, and perhaps all this unnaturalness serves as a constant warning to the one gazing into the abyss before the screen...

In your daze, you're not even sure when the video playback ended... while a single phrase keeps echoing in your ears...

"Would you like to experience a death that isn't just darkness?\""
options: cutCommLink:Did I just... see a ghost?(Leave)

script:

SetTextHighlights "\"Offer your purest entirety to the divine... or to me, if you prefer...\""
text:
When you send out a communication request, there seems to be no immediate response... However, shortly after, a pre-recorded video appears on your personal terminal.

In the footage appears an exceptionally tall white-haired woman... Divinity might be her only defining trait, as an elegant dress adorned with crosses combined with the natural white light emanating from her entire body creates an illusion... as if a saint from mythology has truly materialized before your eyes...

So much so that under such radiance... until the recording ends, you fail to notice that for someone who should be a pure and holy divine messenger, that bewitching body is brazenly expressing blasphemous sin...

"Offer your purest entirety to the divine... or to me, if you prefer..."
options: cutCommLink:Such an... expansive embrace.(Leave)

script:

SetTextHighlightColors CROSS_GARY
SetTextHighlights "\"To be precise... not just people~ But trust that Illis is never wrong... just like trusting in me~\"" "\"You're probably thinking something impolite right now... like whether I'm worthy of your trust, perhaps?\"" "\"Or perhaps... why I don't appear as solemn as I look?\"" "\"Hehe... you should become more inscrutable, Persean.\"" "\"Don't worry... at least I can't read minds through an electronic screen.\""
text:
"To be precise... not just people~ But trust that Illis is never wrong... just like trusting in me..."

Please... that whole string of numbers in the records looks completely made up.

After all... are you really worthy of my trust? As they say, appearances can be deceiving, why would someone who appears holy and solemn be so frivolous...

"You're probably thinking something impolite right now... like whether I'm worthy of your trust, perhaps?"
"Or perhaps... why I don't appear as solemn as I look?"

......Alright.

So this so-called witch does have some mind-reading magic after all?

"Hehe... you should become more inscrutable, Persean."
"Don't worry... at least I can't read minds through an electronic screen."

So... face-to-face would work?

"You know... almost all objective idealistic carriers have many troublesome regulations..."
"Would someone like me really believe in those self-contradicting stories?"

So... she really is a historical criminal who's completely devoted to her own desires and plagues the world.

"But as I've foreseen, wherever humans go, they continue to hold onto faith~"
"This time, whose divine cross shall I become?"

......
This might be the first time I've felt sympathy for the Luddic faithful...
